D:\Env\msys2\ucrt64\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -g -T C:/Users/Drs/Desktop/bootloader/syscfg/mspm0g3507.lds -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -specs=nano.specs -Wl,-u,_write -specs=nosys.specs -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=C:/Users/Drs/Desktop/bootloader/build/out/demo.map CMakeFiles/demo.elf.dir/boot.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.elf.dir/interrupt.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.elf.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.elf.dir/__/__/syscfg/startup_mspm0g350x_gcc.c.obj CMakeFiles/demo.elf.dir/__/__/syscfg/ti_msp_dl_config.c.obj -o ..\..\out\demo.elf  ..\bsp\libbsp.a ..\device\libdevice.a -lm ..\bsp\libbsp.a D:\ti\mspm0_sdk\source\ti\driverlib\lib\gcc\m0p\mspm0g1x0x_g3x0x\driverlib.a
